MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Anastasia Emmons is present.
Attorney, A. Jeanne Jorge, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Martha Sipe , is present.
Attorney, Shirley Huang, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Rob Thompson, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of MAY-24-2010 is vacated.
